ab: Ima ka snaw gaga hug?
Nirih tama mu ka hiya.
Ima ka qrijil gaga hug?
Qbsuran mu qrijil ka hiya.
Ima ka laqi gaga hug?
Swayi mu snaw ka hiya.
Gaga qmpah manu ka bubu su hug?
ch: A:你的媽媽從事什麼工作?

ab: Empheytay ka hiya.
Gaga qmpah manu ka tama su hug?
ch: A:你的爸爸從事什麼工作?

ab: Emptgsa ka hiya.
Swayi su snaw ka hiya hug?
Uxay! Dangi swayi mu snaw ka hiya.
ch: B:不是，他是我弟弟的朋友。
en: No, he is my younger brother’s friend.

ab: Qbsuran su qrijil ka hiya hug?
Uxay! Swayi mu qrijil ka hiya.
en: No, she is my younger sister.

ab: Piya hiyi ka tnsapah dha hug?
en: How many people in their family?

ab: Niqan rima hiyi ka tnsapah dha.
en: There are five people in their family.

ab: Piya laqi ka tnsapah namu?
en: How many children in your family?

ab: Kana o spac ka laqi nami.
en: There are four children in our family.

ab: Piya ka swayi su hug?
en: How many younger siblings do you have?

ab: Ungac ku swayi snaw, niqan tru ka swayi qrijil.
ch: B:我沒有弟弟，有三位妹妹。
en: I don’t have any younger brothers, but I have three younger sisters.

ab: Piya ka qbsuran su hug?
en: How many older siblings do you have?

ab: Ungac ku qbsuran.
en: I don’t have any older siblings.

ab: Piya ka mnswayi su hug?
en: How many siblings do you have?

ab: Ungac ku mnswayi.
Mnswayi namu snaw ka yamu hug?
Iq! Qbsuran mu snaw ka hiya.
Tnpusu namu seejiq ka yamu hug?
Iq! Tnpusu nami seejiq ka yami.
Seejiq Balay uri ka hiya hug?
Iq! Seejiq Balay uri ka hiya.
ch: B:是的，她也是賽德克族人。
